name: Unlock-cliff event study — beta-hedged short over frozen forward calendar
role: open PIT dataset + accruing event study; verdict accrues at ~2-5 events/month toward ~100-140 powered events (~3+ years)

calendar.procedure: sha256-freeze next-12-month cliff list from free CryptoRank/Tokenomist pages via scripts/recorders/record-unlock-calendar.mjs -> docs/campaign-E/frozen-calendar-YYYYMMDD.json
calendar.verification: EVERY event verified against the on-chain vesting contract via free public RPCs BEFORE inclusion (contract address, unlock timestamp, amount; verification block recorded per event); unverifiable events excluded
calendar.append_only: calendar additions create a new freeze file + hash; events already inside their entry window at freeze time are ineligible
calendar.historical_leg: OUT OF SCOPE — DefiLlama /emissions is paywalled (HTTP 402, verified 2026-06-09); forward-only

eligibility.perp_listed: Binance USDT-M perp listed and trading at entry date

trade.hedge_leg: long BTC perp sized beta * short notional
trade.beta: rolling 90-day OLS beta of token daily log returns vs BTC, estimated with data through T-11 only
trade.costs: taker 4 bps/side each leg; perp funding paid/received on both legs from recorded prints; no borrow leg

sensitivity_grid.reporting: family-wise MAX-statistic across the 4 cells at every look

scoring.per_event: abnormal hedged return over the window
scoring.aggregate: event-study t-stat, Newey-West, event-clustered, against the quarterly OBF boundaries
scoring.power: ~100-140 powered events needed; at ~2-5 events/month that is ~3+ years (PROJECT_REVIEW section 3 pre-flight gate)
scoring.kill_condition: significantly POSITIVE hedged short-window return at look k>=4 kills the mechanism

source: docs/PROJECT_REVIEW_2026-06-09.md sections 4.1 (unlock-cliff park verdicts), 4.2.5 (forward-only $0 design, CryptoRank/Tokenomist + RPC verification, 2-5 events/month, 100-140 events), 5B
